data.title: Eliza Labs launches Launchpad platform auto.fun to promote fair token issuance mechanism
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Eliza Labs has launched a pump.fun-style Launchpad called auto.fun, which allows users to deploy complex AI agents without any technical skills. It is reported that auto.fun adopts a "fairer than fair" token issuance mechanism to promote a sustainable economy.
ai16z founder Shaw previously stated that the Launchpad platform auto.fun allows creators to independently collect the fees generated by content creation and token issuance, and the community can collaborate to initiate content or create CTO tokens based on other platforms. The platform emphasizes "anti-hype" and "pure fun" and aims to create a decentralized, transparent and truly creator- and community-owned content and token release space. (The Block)

data.title: U.S. Court Issues Final Judgment Against CLS Global for Crypto Market Manipulation
data.description:
According to PANews, the U.S. District Court in Massachusetts has issued a final judgment against UAE-based entity CLS Global FZC LLC. The court found that CLS Global manipulated the price of the cryptocurrency asset 'NexFundAI' by creating a false active trading market, misleading retail investors into purchasing the asset. CLS Global has agreed to pay a fine of $425,000 along with related interest and is required to cease business activities with U.S.-related individuals or entities.

Earlier this year, it was reported that crypto market maker CLS Global pleaded guilty following a sting operation and investigation by the FBI.

data.title: Backpack CEO Armani: Actively deploying compliance systems to cover both crypto services and traditional financial services in the future
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Backpack CEO Armani revealed in a community AMA that Backpack is actively laying out a compliance system, and will cover both crypto services and traditional financial services in the future. In addition, Armani also shared Backpack's vision - to become the preferred financial service provider for global users, and introduced that the name of Backpack was inspired by the "backpack" item of the "World of Warcraft" character.
He said: "In the crypto world, Backpack has become a carrier of crypto assets, a tool that can carry credit cards, cash, and even all important items, allowing people to carry it around the world and start an adventure. Backpack represents freedom, self-sufficiency and the spirit of exploration. This is not only the name of a fintech product, but also a symbol of the new generation of global financial institutions that we hope to create."

data.title: US SEC: Cryptocurrency market maker CLS Global FZC has admitted to violating securities laws
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) announced that the U.S. District Court for the District of Massachusetts has made a final judgment against CLS Global FZC LLC, a UAE entity that claims to be a crypto asset market maker, for violating securities laws. In addition, the U.S. SEC accused CLS Global of participating in a plan to manipulate the "NexFundAI" market by offering and selling a crypto asset to retail investors as a security, with the aim of inducing victim investors to buy NexFundAI by creating the illusion of an active trading market. CLS Global agreed to the final judgment, according to which it will be required to pay a civil penalty of $425,000, $3,000 in disgorgement, and $80.39 in prejudgment interest.

data.title: Glassnode: Stablecoin supply slows down, crypto market liquidity shrinks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Glassnode published an article on the X platform stating that the supply of stablecoins is still growing, but the growth rate has slowed down in recent weeks. Since stablecoins are widely used as core pricing assets in the crypto market, this slowdown further confirms the trend of shrinking liquidity and declining risk appetite in the entire digital asset market.

data.title: ECB President Lagarde: Efforts on digital euro must be stepped up
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said that this is a critical moment for Europe to seize opportunities, and the EU must increase its efforts in capital market union and digital euro. (Jinshi)

data.title: Market News: Binance is in contact with multiple sovereign wealth funds to establish cryptocurrency reserves
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news: Binance said that it has been contacted by multiple governments and sovereign wealth funds, intending to establish cryptocurrency reserves. It is reported that Binance CEO Richard Teng said in an interview with the Financial Times on April 17 that Binance has been providing advice to multiple governments on establishing strategic Bitcoin reserves and formulating crypto asset regulations. He said: "In fact, we have received a lot of advice from some governments and sovereign wealth funds on establishing their own crypto reserves." Although no specific countries were named, Richard Teng said that the United States is far ahead in this regard.

data.title: Lagarde Urges EU to Seize Opportunities in Capital Markets and Digital Euro
data.description: According to Odaily, European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde emphasized that now is a crucial moment for Europe to seize opportunities. She urged the European Union to intensify efforts in developing the Capital Markets Union and the digital euro.

data.title: Greeks.live: Traders expect BTC prices to continue to fluctuate and may return to the $80,000-82,000 level
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live released a community briefing stating that the community mainly holds a bearish to neutral stance, and traders expect Bitcoin prices to continue to fluctuate and may return to the $80,000 to $82,000 level. Although some optimistic bulls expect prices to rise to $90,000, most traders remain cautious and lack confidence in the direction of the market, turning their attention to volatility trends and option ratios. Powell's remarks created downward pressure as expectations for a 100 basis point rate cut this year were lowered, leading to a stronger correlation between cryptocurrencies and traditional markets.

data.title: ECB President Lagarde Discusses Central Bank Relations and Tariff Responses
data.description: According to Odaily, European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde expressed strong respect for U.S. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, emphasizing the solid and stable relationships between central banks globally. During the June meeting, the situation regarding tariffs remained unclear. The European Union's most apparent response is to offer zero tariffs and redirect the flow of goods. However, there was no discussion on stimulus measures. Although a potential 50 basis point rate cut was mentioned, the market reacted strongly to a 25 basis point reduction.
